channel.title: AI English Daily
channel.description: Daily AI news delivered as business English presentations. Curated for data scientists and engineering managers. Practice shadowing, expand vocabulary, master presentation frameworks.
channel.itunes:author: Kenichiro Nishioka
channel.itunes:summary: Daily AI news delivered as business English presentations.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/29
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution вАФ Frame the current context, name the tension, then close with a practical resolution.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic Official Blog: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation вАФ Anthropic announced a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, backed by major investors and infrastructure partners. вАҐ Mistral AI News: AI Now Summit 2026 вАФ Mistral announced an industrial engineering stack, a unified Vibe agent for long-horizon work, and a dedicated 10 MW inference data center in Les Ulis. вАҐ Mistral AI News: Introducing Search Toolkit вАФ Mistral released Search Toolkit in public preview as an open-source framework covering ingestion, retrieval, and evaluation for production search pipelines. вАҐ xAI News: Grok Build 0.1 on API вАФ xAI made grok-build-0. вАҐ Mistral AI Customers: Mission-focused AI: How HTX transforms SingaporeвАЩs public safety with custom and local AI вАФ Mistral described how SingaporeвАЩs HTX built Phoenix Small and Medium models on NGINE using Mistral Forge for controlled, public-safety-focused AI deployment.
вЬ® Featured expressions: underscores a critical shift, the overall picture reveals, beyond just acquiring powerful models (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: post-money valuation //po Кst ЋИm Мni ЋМv√¶ljuЋИe…™ Г…Щn//, inference data center //ЋИ…™nf…Щr…Щns ЋИde…™t…Щ ЋИsent…Щr//, retrieval quality //r…™ЋИtriЋРv…Щl ЋИkw…СЋРl…Щti//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/28
item.description:
Today's framework: WhatвЖТSo WhatвЖТNow What вАФ Clarify what happened, why it matters, and what to do next.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: OpenAI turns tax-production traces into Codex eval loops. вАҐ AWS Machine Learning Blog: AWS frames payments and budget guardrails as agent infrastructure. вАҐ LangChain Blog: Lyft shows self-serve support-agent iteration with tracing and evals. вАҐ Hugging Face Blog: ITBench-AA shows frontier models below 50% on enterprise SRE tasks. вАҐ Mistral AI News: Mistral buys Emmi AI to push physics-aware industrial agents.
вЬ® Featured expressions: moving from impressive demos into operating systems for real work, money movement as a first-class engineering concern, every failure can become a hill to climb (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: production traces //pr…ЩЋИd Мk Г…Щn tre…™s…™z//, payment rails //ЋИpe…™m…Щnt re…™lz//, observability //…ЩbЋМz…ЭЋРv…ЩЋИb…™l…Щti//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/27
item.description:
Today's framework: Before вЖТ After вЖТ Bridge вАФ Show the old reality, the new reality, and the practical path between them.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ SemiAnalysis InferenceX: AMD MI355X Qwen3.5 397B-A17B Inference: Up to 19x Throughput per GPU in 3 Months on SGLang FP8 вАФ SemiAnalysis reported that AMD MI355X SGLang FP8 throughput on Qwen3. вАҐ Mistral AI: Introducing Mistral 3 вАФ Mistral introduced Mistral 3, including Mistral Large 3, a 675B-parameter sparse mixture-of-experts model with 41B active parameters, plus small Ministral models for edge and local use. вАҐ Anthropic: Project Glasswing: An initial update вАФ Anthropic said Project Glasswing partners have found more than ten thousand high- or critical-severity vulnerabilities with Claude Mythos Preview, and that early open-source scanning surfaced thousands of likely serious findings.
вЬ® Featured expressions: To put that in context, Another way to frame it is, The practical takeaway is (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: inference /ЋИ…™nf…Щr…Щns/, throughput /ЋИќЄruЋРp Кt/, open-weight /ЋМo Кp…Щn ЋИwe…™t/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/26
item.description:
Today's framework: Problem вЖТ Solution вЖТ Impact вАФ Frame the business problem, explain the solution pattern, then close with practical impact.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Help Net Security / Anthropic: Anthropic adds 28 security and compliance integrations for Claude вАФ Anthropic introduced 28 integrations around the Claude Compliance API so IT and security teams can pipe Claude Enterprise content and activity events into existing DLP, SIEM, identity, eDiscovery, observability, and AI security tools. вАҐ Hugging Face Blog: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right вАФ Hugging Face published a practical glossary for agent terms such as model, scaffolding, harness, context engineering, policy, tool use, skills, sub-agents, and rollout. вАҐ Red Hat Developer: MCP servers vs. skills: Choosing the right context for your AI вАФ Red Hat explained when to use MCP servers versus skills for adding context to large language models, framing MCP as the right path for external services and skills as a way to package repeatable instructions and domain knowledge. вАҐ AWS Machine Learning Blog: Agents that transact: Introducing Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments, built with Coinbase and Stripe вАФ AWS announced Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments in preview, built with Coinbase and Stripe, so agents can access and pay for web content, APIs, MCP servers, and other agents within an execution loop under spending governance and observability. вАҐ Mistral AI News: Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry вАФ Mistral AI entered a definitive agreement to acquire Physics AI pioneer Emmi AI, adding more than 30 researchers and engineers to its Science and Applied AI teams and targeting real-time engineering simulations and digital twins.
вЬ® Featured expressions: The common theme in today's stories is that..., That changes the question., Put differently (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: governance //ЋИ…° Мv…Щrn…Щns//, harness //ЋИh…СЋРrn…Щs//, scaffolding //ЋИsk√¶f…Щld…™≈Л//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/25
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point -> Reason -> Example -> Point: lead with the takeaway, justify it, ground it in evidence, and restate the action-oriented message.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Model Context Protocol: The 2026-07-28 MCP Specification Release Candidate вАФ The MCP release candidate removes protocol-level sessions, makes requests stateless, adds first-class extensions including MCP Apps and Tasks, and hardens authorization. вАҐ Google Blog: The Gemini app becomes more agentic, delivering proactive, 24/7 help вАФ Google announced Gemini 3. вАҐ Mistral AI: Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry вАФ Mistral entered a definitive agreement to acquire Emmi AI, adding Physics AI talent and models for real-time industrial simulation and digital twins.
вЬ® Featured expressions: the true potential of AI agents cannot be fully realized or scaled efficiently, moving from a phase where agents were impressive individual feats to a stage where they must operate cohesively, paves the way for a more integrated and secure AI landscape (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: stateless //ЋИste…™tl…Щs//, authorization //ЋМ…ФЋРќЄ…Щr…ЩЋИze…™ Г…Щn//, agentic //e…™ЋИd Тent…™k//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/24
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution вАФ Set the context, clarify the tension, then land on the practical response.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Mistral AI: Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry вАФ Mistral AI entered a definitive agreement to acquire Emmi AI, a Physics AI pioneer for industrial engineering, adding more than 30 researchers and engineers to Mistral Science and Applied AI teams. вАҐ Windsurf: Wave 13: Merry Shipmas вАФ Windsurf Wave 13 adds first-class support for parallel, multi-agent sessions, Git worktrees, side-by-side Cascade panes, and a dedicated terminal profile for agent execution. вАҐ Modal: Modal's Series C: Raising $355M at a $4.65B valuation вАФ Modal raised $355 million at a $4.65 billion post-money valuation after growing fivefold since September and surpassing $300 million in annualized revenue.
вЬ® Featured expressions: the center of gravity is moving, not just a talent acquisition, part of the normal software process (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: Physics AI //ЋИf…™z…™ks ЋМe…™ ЋИa…™//, Git worktrees //…°…™t ЋИw…ЬЋРrkЋМtriЋРz//, sandboxed execution //ЋИs√¶ndЋМb…СЋРkst ЋМeks…™ЋИkjuЋР Г…Щn//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/23
item.description:
Today's framework: What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What вАФ Explain what happened, why it matters, and what to watch or do next.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry вАФ OpenAI says a general-purpose reasoning model found a proof that disproves a central conjecture in the planar unit distance problem, first posed by Paul Erd≈Сs in 1946. вАҐ Cursor: Improvements to Cursor Automations вАФ Cursor brought Automations into the Agents Window and added multi-repo and no-repo automation support, with templates for Slack digests, product analytics, FAQs, finance, and customer health. вАҐ Simon Willison: Datasette Agent вАФ Simon Willison announced Datasette Agent, an extensible AI assistant for querying Datasette databases conversationally, generating charts, and running through plugins and local models. вАҐ GitHub Changelog: Semantic issue search in Copilot Chat вАФ GitHub made semantic issue search generally available in Copilot Chat on web, letting developers use natural language to find and group issues by intent rather than exact keywords.
вЬ® Featured expressions: raises the ceiling, a source of original technical insight, cross-system work (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: conjecture //k…ЩnЋИd Тek.t Г…Щr//, discrete geometry //d…™ЋИskriЋРt d ТiЋИ…СЋР.m…Щ.tri//, semantic issue search //s…™ЋИm√¶n.t…™k ЋИ…™ Г.uЋР s…ЭЋРt Г//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/22
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution вАФ Frame the current context, surface the constraint, then show the practical path forward.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Microsoft .NET Blog: Announcing Agent Governance Toolkit MCP Extensions for .NET вАФ Microsoft announced a Public Preview companion package for the official MCP C# SDK that adds policy enforcement, startup scanning, runtime governance, response sanitization, audit, and metrics to . вАҐ LangChain Blog: New in Deep Agents v0.6 вАФ Deep Agents v0. вАҐ Latent Space: Giving Agents Computers вАФ Ivan Burazin, Daytona вАФ Latent Space published an interview with DaytonaвАЩs CEO about providing bare-metal sandboxes and specialized infrastructure for agent workloads, including reinforcement-learning and evaluation workloads. вАҐ GitHub Changelog: Updates to available models in Copilot on web вАФ GitHub updated the available model selection for Copilot Chat on the web, removing several models while keeping OpenAI and Claude models across price points available across plans. вАҐ Goldman Sachs Insights: AI Agents Forecast to Boost Tech Cash Flow as Usage Soars вАФ Goldman Sachs forecast that agentic AI adoption could drive a 24-fold increase in token consumption by 2030 and contribute to chip shortages over the next 12 to 18 months.
вЬ® Featured expressions: poised to drive, gaining paramount importance, bespoke plumbing (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: agentic AI /e…™ЋИd Тen.t…™k ЋМe…™ ЋИa…™/, token consumption /ЋИto К.k…Щn k…ЩnЋИs Мmp. Г…Щn/, runtime governance /ЋИr Мn.ta…™m ЋИ…° Мv.…Щr.n…Щns/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/21
item.description:
Today's framework: What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What вАФ State the facts, explain why they matter, then say what to do next.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic (Claude Blog): Claude Managed Agents вАФ self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels keep tool execution and internal systems inside the customer's security perimeter. вАҐ VentureBeat: Gemini 3.5 Flash GA вАФ a frontier-level model at $1.50/$9 per 1M tokens with a 1M context window and ~4x speed changes the cost math for agents. вАҐ Help Net Security: AI agents in production вАФ a confused-deputy problem and a propose-commit split for safe write access to infrastructure.
вЬ® Featured expressions: decoupling the agent's brain from its hands so to speak, fundamentally changes the cost math, now is the time to re-evaluate (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: orchestration //ЋМ…ФЋРrk…™ЋИstre…™ Г…Щn//, telemetry //t…ЩЋИlem…Щtri//, security perimeter //s…™ЋИkj К…Щr…Щti p…ЩЋИr…™m…™t…Щr//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/20
item.description:
Today's framework: Before вЖТ After вЖТ Bridge вАФ Contrast the old state, the new state, and the transition that connects them.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Google Blog: I/O 2026 agentic Gemini era вАФ Google reported massive Gemini usage and positioned agents as a product-platform shift. вАҐ Google Blog: I/O announcements вАФ Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash, and Antigravity push AI toward multimodal action and agent-first development. вАҐ AWS ML Blog: Frontier agents вАФ AWS made Security Agent and DevOps Agent generally available for security testing and operations. вАҐ LangChain Blog: LangSmith Engine вАФ LangChain explained an agent that turns traces and failures into issues, evaluators, and fixes. вАҐ OpenAI: Content provenance вАФ OpenAI added C2PA conformance, SynthID watermarking, and a public image verification preview.
вЬ® Featured expressions: turn impressive AI features into dependable business infrastructure, take responsibility for a workflow, the operating load of an AI platform (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: provenance //ЋИpr…Тv…Щn…Щns//, agentic //e…™ЋИd Тent…™k//, penetration testing //ЋМpen…ЩЋИtre…™ Г…Щn ЋИtest…™≈Л//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/19
item.description:
Today's framework: Problem вЖТ Solution вЖТ Impact вАФ Define the core business problem, explain the practical solution, then show the operational impact.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: OpenAI and Dell Technologies partner to bring Codex to hybrid and... вАФ OpenAI and Dell Technologies announced a collaboration to help enterprises deploy Codex... вАҐ Anthropic: Anthropic acquires Stainless вАФ Anthropic announced it is acquiring Stainless, whose tooling generates SDKs, CLIs, and MCP... вАҐ GitHub Blog: Take your local GitHub sessions anywhere вАФ GitHub made remote control for Copilot CLI sessions generally available on github.com and... вАҐ Hugging Face / IBM Research: The Open Agent Leaderboard вАФ Hugging Face and IBM Research launched the Open Agent Leaderboard and Exgentic framework to... вАҐ Google Gemini Help / PCWorld: Google shifts Gemini usage limits toward compute-based quotas вАФ Google updated Gemini usage guidance around compute-based limits, with usage affected by...
вЬ® Featured expressions: the operating model around them is still catching up, the quality of the bridges around it, measurement discipline (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: hybrid deployment /ЋИha…™br…™d d…™ЋИpl…Ф…™m…Щnt/, data governance /ЋИde…™t…Щ ЋИ…° Мv…Щrn…Щns/, connector layer /k…ЩЋИn…Ыkt…Щr ЋИle…™…Щr/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/18
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point вЖТ Reason вЖТ Example вЖТ Point: lead with the takeaway, justify it, support it with examples, then restate the takeaway.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Meta Newsroom: Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI вАФ Meta launched Incognito Chat with Meta AI on WhatsApp and the Meta AI app, built on WhatsApp Private Processing. вАҐ Notion Blog: Introducing NotionвАЩs Developer Platform вАФ Notion introduced a Developer Platform with Workers for hosted custom code, External Agents that appear as native workspace participants, an External Agent API for bringing internal agents into Notion, and the ntn CLI for terminal and IDE workflows. вАҐ OpenAI Codex Changelog: Work with Codex from anywhere вАФ OpenAI added the ability to use Codex from the ChatGPT mobile app by connecting to a Mac running the Codex app.
вЬ® Featured expressions: marked by a strong emphasis on, coupled with an increasing focus on, The practical takeaway is that (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: Incognito Chat /…™nЋИk…Т…°n…™to К t Г√¶t/, Private Processing /ЋИpra…™v…Щt ЋИpr…СЋРses…™≈Л/, External Agents /…™kЋИst…ЬЋРrn…Щl ЋИe…™d Т…Щnts/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/17
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution вАФ Frame the current state, surface the tension, then close with the practical resolution.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows вАФ Databricks is making GPT-5. вАҐ CIO Dive: xAI joins crowded coding agent race with Grok Build вАФ xAI unveiled Grok Build, an early-beta agentic command-line interface for software engineering and complex coding, available to SuperGrok Heavy subscribers. вАҐ Cursor Changelog: Development environments for cloud agents вАФ Cursor introduced configurable development environments for cloud agents, including multi-repo environments, Dockerfile-based configuration, build secrets, faster layer caching, version history, audit logs, and scoped egress and secrets. вАҐ LangChain Blog: New in Deep Agents v0.6 вАФ LangChainвАЩs Deep Agents v0. вАҐ Sebastian Raschka: Recent Developments in LLM Architectures: KV Sharing, mHC, and Compressed Attention вАФ Sebastian Raschka reviewed recent open-weight LLM architecture changes such as KV sharing in Gemma 4, compressed convolutional attention in ZAYA1, attention budgeting in Laguna XS.
вЬ® Featured expressions: moving beyond mere conversational interfaces, raw conversational prowess, a strategic battleground (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: orchestration /ЋМ…ФЋРrk…ЩЋИstre…™ Г…Щn/, checkpoint storage /ЋИt Гekp…Ф…™nt ЋИst…ФЋРr…™d Т/, command-line interface /k…ЩЋИm√¶nd la…™n ЋИ…™nt…Щrfe…™s/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/16
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution вАФ Set the business context, explain the risk or tension, then close with practical next steps.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ AWS Machine Learning Blog: AWS launches frontier agents for security testing and cloud operations вАФ AWS announced general availability of AWS Security Agent for on-demand penetration testing and AWS DevOps Agent for autonomous operational workflows across AWS, multicloud, and on-premises environments. вАҐ Visual Studio Code Blog: The Coding Harness Behind GitHub Copilot in VS Code вАФ The VS Code team published a deep dive on the coding harness behind GitHub Copilot, describing how it assembles context, exposes tools, validates tool calls, runs the agent loop, and feeds observations back to the model. вАҐ xAI Docs: Grok Model Retirement on May 15, 2026 вАФ xAI retired several earlier Grok API model slugs effective May 15, automatically redirecting requests to Grok 4.3 or a newer image model and warning developers about pricing differences.
вЬ® Featured expressions: high-stakes workflows, the visible API call looks stable, remove bottlenecks without removing accountability (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: penetration testing /ЋМpen…™ЋИtre…™ Г…Щn ЋИtest…™≈Л/, incident resolution /ЋИ…™ns…™d…Щnt ЋМrez…ЩЋИluЋР Г…Щn/, model slug /ЋИm…СЋРd…Щl sl М…°/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/15
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution вАФ Frame the current context, explain the tension, then close with practical actions.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ xAI Docs: Grok Model Retirement on May 15, 2026 вАФ xAI is retiring several older Grok API model slugs on May 15 and automatically redirecting them to Grok 4. вАҐ GitHub Blog: Changes to GitHub Copilot Individual plans вАФ GitHub updated its Copilot Individual plan changes: new Pro, Pro+, and Student sign-ups are paused, usage limits are tightened, model availability changes, and VS Code plus Copilot CLI now show approaching usage limits. вАҐ LangChain Blog: New in Deep Agents v0.6 вАФ LangChain released Deep Agents v0. вАҐ Cursor Changelog: Development environments for cloud agents вАФ Cursor introduced configurable development environments for cloud agents, including multi-repo environments, Dockerfile-based configuration, build secrets, faster layer caching, validation, version history, audit logs, and environment-level secret scoping.
вЬ® Featured expressions: the center of gravity is moving, production hygiene, financially legible (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: model slug /ЋИm…СЋРd…Щl sl М…°/, reasoning effort /ЋИriЋРz…Щn…™≈Л ЋИef…Щrt/, agentic workflow /e…™ЋИd Тent…™k ЋИw…ЬЋРrkflo К/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/14
item.description:
Today's framework: WhatвЖТSo WhatвЖТNow What вАФ Separate the facts, the business implications, and the next actions.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic News: Introducing Claude for Small Business вАФ Anthropic packaged Claude into small-business workflows across everyday tools. вАҐ Cursor Changelog: Development environments for cloud agents вАФ Cursor added controlled cloud-agent environments with multi-repo setup, secrets, caching, audit logs, and scoped access. вАҐ LangChain Blog: Introducing LangSmith Engine вАФ LangChain launched a beta system that turns production traces into clustered issues, fixes, and eval coverage. вАҐ LangChain Blog: LangSmith Sandboxes are Generally Available вАФ LangChain made isolated microVM sandboxes generally available for model-generated code execution. вАҐ LangChain Blog: Introducing Managed Deep Agents вАФ LangChain introduced a hosted runtime for durable, long-running agents with context, tools, tracing, and approval.
вЬ® Featured expressions: the operating layer, remove operational friction, the control surface is mature enough (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: cloud agents /kla Кd ЋИe…™d Т…Щnts/, production traces /pr…ЩЋИd Мk Г…Щn tre…™s…™z/, evaluator /…™ЋИv√¶ljue…™t…Щr/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/13
item.description:
Today's framework: Before вЖТ After вЖТ Bridge вАФ Contrast the old state with the new state, then connect both to the practical transition plan.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: OpenAI launches the OpenAI Deployment Company to help businesses build around intelligence вАФ OpenAI launched the OpenAI Deployment Company, agreed to acquire Tomoro, and said the new unit will embed Forward Deployed Engineers into organizations to build production AI systems around critical workflows. вАҐ Google Blog: Gemini Intelligence brings proactive AI to Android вАФ At The Android Show 2026, Google introduced Gemini Intelligence, a set of proactive Android AI features intended to automate tasks across apps, generate custom widgets, refine spoken messages, and expand to phones, wearables, cars, glasses, and laptops. вАҐ The Hacker News: OpenAI Launches Daybreak for AI-Powered Vulnerability Detection and Patch Validation вАФ The Hacker News reported that OpenAI launched Daybreak, a cybersecurity initiative for secure code review, threat modeling, vulnerability testing, patch validation, dependency risk analysis, and remediation guidance. вАҐ The Hacker News: Mini Shai-Hulud Worm Compromises TanStack, Mistral AI, Guardrails AI & More Packages вАФ A Mini Shai-Hulud campaign compromised npm and PyPI packages tied to TanStack, UiPath, Mistral AI, OpenSearch, and Guardrails AI, adding credential-stealing malware and IDE persistence hooks.
вЬ® Featured expressions: hands-on operating-model change, pull-based, cross-application delegation (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: agentic //e…™ЋИd Тen.t…™k//, deployment //d…™ЋИpl…Ф…™.m…Щnt//, threat modeling //ќЄret ЋИm…СЋР.d…Щl.…™≈Л//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/12
item.description:
Today's framework: Problem вЖТ Solution вЖТ Impact вАФ Frame the business bottleneck, show the operating solution, then clarify the practical impact.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI Blog: OpenAI launches the OpenAI Deployment Company to help businesses build around intelligence вАФ OpenAI launched a majority-controlled Deployment Company with more than $4 billion of initial investment. вАҐ Anthropic News: Agents for financial services вАФ Anthropic released ten ready-to-run financial-services agent templates. вАҐ AWS News Blog: AWS Weekly Roundup: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments, Agent Toolkit for AWS, and more вАФ AWS highlighted Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments in preview. вАҐ Anthropic News: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX вАФ Anthropic announced a SpaceX partnership for access to more than 300 megawatts of capacity.
вЬ® Featured expressions: deployment bottleneck, necessary, but not sufficient, inside policy boundaries (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: deployment //d…™ЋИpl…Ф…™m…Щnt//, agent template //ЋИe…™d Т…Щnt ЋИt…Ыmpl…Щt//, audit trail //ЋИ…ФЋРd…™t tre…™l//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/11
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point вЖТ Reason вЖТ Example вЖТ Point: state your claim, justify it, illustrate it, then drive it home.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ LangChain Blog: Building a company due diligence agent вАФ Five parallel subagents cover corporate profile, financials, litigation, reputation, and competitors, then fan out per-competitor analysis with isolated contexts and per-field citations. вАҐ OpenAI Engineering: Advancing voice intelligence вАФ GPT-Realtime-2 (GPT-5-class reasoning), GPT-Realtime-Translate (70+ input languages), and GPT-Realtime-Whisper (streaming transcription) shift voice from UI layer to app runtime. вАҐ OpenAI: Testing ads in ChatGPT вАФ Expanded to UK, Japan, South Korea; Anthropic stays ad-free. The business model split is now concrete.
вЬ® Featured expressions: strategic fork in the road, compelling differentiator, fan-out orchestration (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: due diligence /djuЋР ЋИd…™l…™d Т…Щns/, orchestrator /ЋИ…ФЋРk…™stre…™t…Щr/, calibrated confidence score /ЋИk√¶l…™bre…™t…™d/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/10
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution вАФ Frame any challenge as current state, the tension it creates, and how it gets resolved.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: Testing ads in ChatGPT вАФ expanded to UK, Japan, South Korea and more вАФ OpenAI announced it will expand its ChatGPT advertising pilot to the UK, Mexico, Brazil, Japan, and South Korea in the coming weeks. вАҐ LangChain Blog: The Agent Development Lifecycle вАФ LangChain CEO Harrison Chase published a framework for production agent development organized around four phases: Build вЖТ Test вЖТ Deploy вЖТ Monitor. вАҐ OpenAI: Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT вАФ OpenAI launched 'Trusted Contact', an optional feature in ChatGPT that allows adults to nominate a friend, family member, or caregiver who may be notified if automated systems and human reviewers detect the enrolled person may be in acute distress.
вЬ® Featured expressions: dive into, in practice, think through (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: metrics //ЋИmetr…™ks//, taxonomy //t√¶kЋИs…Тn…Щmi//, governance //ЋИ…° Мv…Щrn…Щns//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/09
item.description:
Today's framework: Before вЖТ After вЖТ Bridge вАФ Set the scene before the change, describe what's different now, then connect it to what you should do next.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Cursor Changelog: PR Review, Build Plan in Parallel, and Split PRs вАФ Cursor ships native in-IDE PR review, parallel async subagent plan execution, and auto-split-to-PRs, covering the full loop from writing code to shipping it. вАҐ OpenAI: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber вАФ GPT-5.5-Cyber launches in limited preview for critical infrastructure defenders with identity-verified access and lower refusal rates for defensive security workflows. вАҐ OpenAI Security: Running Codex safely at OpenAI вАФ OpenAI publishes their internal Codex deployment blueprint: sandboxed execution, managed network policies, auto-approval for low-risk actions, and OpenTelemetry agent-intent logs. вАҐ Hugging Face Blog (AllenAI): EMO: Pretraining Mixture of Experts for Emergent Modularity вАФ AllenAI's new MoE pretraining method lets experts specialize organically, reducing the manual routing-tuning burden that has slowed frontier model development.
вЬ® Featured expressions: serial task queuing, the upshot is, said another way (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: async subagent /ЋИe…™s…™≈Лk ЋИs Мbe…™d Т…Щnt/, identity-gated /a…™ЋИdent…™ti ЋИ…°e…™t…™d/, sandboxed execution /ЋИs√¶ndb…Тkst …™kЋИsekjuЋР Г…Щn/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/08
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation-Complication-Resolution вАФ Set the scene, introduce the tension, then resolve with insight or action.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI Engineering: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API вАФ OpenAI launched three new realtime voice models via API: GPT-Realtime-2 (GPT-5-class reasoning in live voice, 128K context, parallel tool calls), GPT-Realtime-Translate (live speech translation across 70+ input languages into 13 output languages), and GPT-Realtime-Whisper (streaming speech-to-text transcription as the speaker talks). вАҐ Mozilla Hacks: Behind the Scenes Hardening Firefox with Claude Mythos Preview вАФ Mozilla published a detailed technical post on how they used Claude Mythos Preview (plus other AI models) to find and fix an unprecedented number of latent security vulnerabilities in Firefox. вАҐ Simon Willison: Notes on the xAI/Anthropic data center deal вАФ Anthropic announced at the Code w/ Claude event that they are leasing all capacity of Colossus 1, xAI/SpaceX's Memphis data center, to address compute constraints.
вЬ® Featured expressions: Let's dive into, paving the way for, To put that in context (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: context window //ЋИk…Тntekst ЋИw…™ndo К//, latent security vulnerabilities //ЋИle…™t…Щnt s…™ЋИkj К…Щr…™tiЋР ЋМv Мln…Щr…ЩЋИb…™l…™tiz//, compute constraints //k…ЩmЋИpjuЋРt k…ЩnЋИstre…™nts//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/07
item.description:
Today's framework: What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What вАФ State the facts, draw the implications, then give actionable next steps.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Simon Willison: Code w/ Claude 2026: Anthropic launches multi-agent orchestration, Dreaming, and SpaceX Colossus partnership вАФ At Anthropic's Code w/ Claude developer event, the company announced three new features for Claude Managed Agents: multi-agent orchestration to deploy fleets of specialized agents on complex tasks; Outcomes, which lets you define what success looks like so Claude iterates until it gets there; and Dreaming, an overnight mode where Claude replays previous sessions to synthesize new memories and self-generated playbooks. вАҐ OpenAI: How frontier enterprises are building an AI advantage вАФ introducing B2B Signals вАФ OpenAI published the inaugural B2B Signals report, a recurring study of enterprise AI adoption using aggregated, de-identified usage data. вАҐ OpenAI Engineering: Supercomputer networking to accelerate large-scale AI training вАФ OpenAI open-sources MRC вАФ OpenAI released MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a novel GPU networking protocol co-developed with AMD, Broadcom, Intel, Microsoft, and NVIDIA, through the Open Compute Project. вАҐ Simon Willison: Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I'd like вАФ Simon Willison reflects on a realization from a recent podcast interview: the boundary between vibe coding (generating code without reviewing it) and agentic engineering (using AI tools with full professional rigor) is blurring in his own work.
вЬ® Featured expressions: To put that in context, The short version is that, What this really means is that (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: Multi-agent orchestration //ЋМm Мlti ЋИe…™d Т…Щnt ЋМ…ФЋРrkeЋИstre…™ Г…Щn//, Agentic engineering //e…™ЋИd Тent…™k ЋМend Т…™ЋИn…™…Щr…™≈Л//, Frontier firms //fr МnЋИt…™…Щr f…ЬЋРrmz//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/06
item.description:
Today's framework: BeforeвЖТAfterвЖТBridge вАФ Set the scene, show what changed, then connect it to your work
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized вАФ OpenAI replaced GPT-5.3 Instant with GPT-5.5 Instant as ChatGPT's default model for all users. The update delivers 52.5%. вАҐ LangChain Blog: Agent observability needs feedback to power learning вАФ LangChain founder Harrison Chase published an essay arguing that agent observability must go beyond trace debugging to p. вАҐ Cursor Changelog: Model controls, spend management, and usage analytics вАФ Cursor released a set of Enterprise admin features: granular model access controls letting admins allowlist or blocklist.
вЬ® Featured expressions: undercut the efficiency gains, a recurring obstacle to [X], immediately actionable, lower the barrier to entry (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: hallucination //ЋМh√¶l.juЋРЋМs…™n.ЋИe…™. Г…Щn//, observability //ЋМ…Тb.z…ЬЋР.v…ЩЋИb…™l.…™.ti//, harness //ЋИh…СЋР.n…™s//, governance //ЋИ…° Мv.…Щn.…Щns//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/05
item.description:
Today's framework: Problem вЖТ Solution вЖТ Impact вАФ Frame each story as a challenge, the industry response, and the real-world consequences
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI Engineering: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale вАФ Rebuilt WebRTC stack with split relay + transceiver architecture to serve 900M+ users with crisp, low-latency voice AI. вАҐ Vercel Engineering: Introducing deepsec вАФ Open-source AI security harness using Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5 that runs on your own infra, scales to 1,000+ sandboxes, 10вАУ20% false-positive rate. вАҐ AWS ML Blog: AgentCore Optimization now in preview вАФ Closed-loop agent improvement: production traces вЖТ recommendations вЖТ batch eval / A/B testing вЖТ ship with statistical confidence.
вЬ® Featured expressions: silent quality drift, closed-loop system, experiment-driven engineering (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: WebRTC /ЋМw…Ыb ЋМ…СЋРr tiЋР ЋИsiЋР/, transceiver architecture /tr√¶nsЋИsiЋРv…Щr ЋИ…СЋРrk…™tekt Г…Щr/, production traces /pr…ЩЋИd Мk Г…Щn ЋИtre…™s…™z/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/04
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point вЖТ Reason вЖТ Example вЖТ Point: state the takeaway, justify it, ground it with evidence, then reinforce.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic Research: How people ask Claude for personal guidance вАФ Anthropic analyzed 1 million Claude conversations using a privacy-preserving tool, finding that roug. вАҐ AWS ML Blog: Configuring Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway for secure access to private resources вАФ AWS announced and documented VPC egress support for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway вАФ enabling AI a.
вЬ® Featured expressions: What this means in practice is, To put that in context, In essence (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: sycophancy /ЋИs…™k.…Щ.f…Щn.si/, empirical /…™mЋИp…™r.…™.k…Щl/, VPC egress /viЋР piЋР siЋР ЋИiЋР.…°res/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/03
item.description:
Today's framework: What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What вАФ Describe what happened, explain why it matters, then define what to do next.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI News: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS вАФ OpenAI and AWS expanded their partnership, putting GPT-5.5 and Codex on Amazon Bedrock so enterprise teams can build on OpenAI inside their existing AWS infrastructure. вАҐ OpenAI Company: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership вАФ Microsoft's license shifts from exclusive to non-exclusive, and the same-week AWS deal reveals a deliberate multi-cloud distribution strategy. вАҐ Cursor: Build programmatic agents with the Cursor SDK вАФ @cursor/sdk lets developers build coding agents programmatically using the same runtime that powers Cursor, turning IDE intelligence into a composable API.
вЬ® Featured expressions: lower the barrier to entry, reducing vendor lock-in risks, first-ship rights (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: non-exclusive license /ЋМn…Тn …™kЋИskluЋРs…™v ЋИla…™s…Щns/, composable API /k…ЩmЋИpo Кz…Щbl ЋМe…™ piЋР ЋИa…™/, multi-cloud strategy /ЋИm Мlti kla Кd ЋИstr√¶t…Щd Тi/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/02
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point вАФ Reason вАФ Evidence вАФ Point (Recap): state the claim, justify it, back it up, and land it.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Cursor Changelog: Cursor Security Review in Beta: Always-On AI Security Agents for Teams вАФ Cursor launched Security Review in beta for Teams and Enterprise plans. It ships two always-on agents: Security Reviewer... вАҐ OpenAI Codex CLI (via Simon Willison): Codex CLI 0.128.0 Adds /goal: Agent Loops Until the Job Is Done вАФ OpenAI shipped Codex CLI version 0.128.0 with a /goal command. Users set a high-level goal (e.g., 'add full test coverag... вАҐ Cursor Changelog: Cursor Team Marketplace: Centralized MCP Plugin Distribution for Engineering Teams вАФ Cursor now allows admins to create a team plugin marketplace without first connecting a repository. Plugins bundle capab... вАҐ UK AI Security Institute: UK AISI Evaluates GPT-5.5: Comparable to Claude Mythos in Cyber CapabilitiesвАФand Publicly Available вАФ The UK AI Security Institute evaluated GPT-5.5 for offensive cybersecurity capabilitiesвАФspecifically its ability to find...
вЬ® Featured expressions: In other words, To put that in context, What this means in practice (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: pull request /p Кl r…™ЋИkwest/, prompt injection /pr…Тmpt …™nЋИd Тek Г…Щn/, Model Context Protocol /ЋИm…Тd…Щl ЋИk…Тntekst ЋИpr…Щ Кt…Щk…Тl/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/01
item.description:
Today's framework: SituationвЖТComplicationвЖТResolution вАФ Identify the situation, expose the complication, then deliver the resolution.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Google DeepMind Blog: Enabling a new model for healthcare with AI co-clinician вАФ Google DeepMind announced its AI co-clinician research initiative, designed to act as a collaborative member of a clinical care team under physician supervision. вАҐ OpenAI News: Introducing Advanced Account Security вАФ OpenAI launched Advanced Account Security, an opt-in setting that requires passkeys or physical security keys (disabling passwords), disables email/SMS recovery in favor of backup passkeys and recovery keys, shortens session windows, and automatically excludes conversations from model training. вАҐ AWS ML Blog: Run custom MCP proxies serverless on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime вАФ AWS published a guide and open-source implementation for deploying a serverless MCP proxy on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime.
вЬ® Featured expressions: a testament to its accuracy and reliability, the margin for error is virtually nonexistent, commensurate with the high stakes involved (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: triadic care model //tra…™ЋИ√¶d…™k k…Ыr ЋИm…Тd…Щl//, dual-agent safety architecture //djuЋР…Щl ЋИe…™d Т…Щnt ЋИse…™fti ЋИ…СЋРk…™t…Ыkt Г…Щr//, credential stuffing //kr…™ЋИd…Ыn Г…Щl ЋИst Мf…™≈Л//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/30
item.description:
Today's framework: What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What вАФ Present the facts, unpack the significance, then map out concrete next steps.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Mistral AI: Remote agents in Vibe + Medium 3.5 вАФ Mistral launched a new mid-tier model and remote coding agents that run entirely in their cloud, no local hardware needed. вАҐ Hugging Face: AI evals are the new compute bottleneck вАФ The HAL team spent $40K on agent rollouts; scaffold choice alone creates a 33x cost spread. вАҐ Simon Willison: LLM 0.32a0 вАФ Major refactor aligns the popular OSS LLM library with vendor API message formats and typed outputs. вАҐ IBM Research: Granite 4.1 вАФ Open Apache 2.0 dense LLMs (3B/8B/30B) with 512K context; the 8B model matches the previous 32B MoE model.
вЬ® Featured expressions: "What this signals is", "To put that in context", "The bigger picture here" (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: remote coding agents /r…™ЋИmo Кt ЋИko Кd…™≈Л ЋИe…™d Т…Щnts/, evaluation scaffold /…™ЋМv√¶ljuЋИe…™ Г…Щn ЋИsk√¶f…Щld/, context window /ЋИk…Тntekst ЋИw…™ndo К/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/29
item.description:
Today's framework: BeforeвЖТAfterвЖТBridge вАФ Map the friction of yesterday to the opportunity of today, then act.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI News: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS вАФ OpenAI and AWS expanded their partnership to bring GPT-5.5, Codex, and Managed Agents natively to Amazon Bedrock in limited preview, letting enterprises access OpenAI's stack within their AWS security perimeter. вАҐ Cursor Changelog: Build programmatic agents with the Cursor SDK вАФ Cursor released a TypeScript SDK in public beta giving programmatic access to its agent runtime, enabling CI/CD and automation use cases beyond the IDE. вАҐ Hugging Face Blog: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni вАФ An open-weights omni-modal model leading benchmarks across documents, GUI, video, and audio with 9.2x throughput gains on video workloads. вАҐ Mistral AI: Workflows for work that runs the business вАФ Mistral's Python-based AI orchestration layer enters public preview with durable execution, observability, and human-in-the-loop approvals already in production at ASML and CMA-CGM.
вЬ® Featured expressions: lower the barrier to entry, within the security perimeter, bridge the gap between X and Y (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: security perimeter /s…™ЋИkj К…Щr…™ti p…ЩЋИr…™m…™t…Щr/, agent runtime /ЋИe…™d Т…Щnt ЋИr Мnta…™m/, human-in-the-loop /ЋИhjuЋРm…Щn …™n √∞…Щ luЋРp/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/28
item.description:
Today's framework: ProblemвЖТSolutionвЖТImpact вАФ Identify the core challenge, present the breakthrough, then quantify the real-world effect.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI Engineering: An open-source spec for Codex orchestration: Symphony вАФ OpenAI released Symphony, an open-source spec and agent orchestrator that connects a project-management board (like Linear) to a fleet of continuously running Codex agents. вАҐ OpenAI Company: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership вАФ OpenAI and Microsoft announced an amended partnership agreement. вАҐ OpenAI News: Introducing GPT-5.5 вАФ GPT-5.
вЬ® Featured expressions: nothing short of transformative, human-in-the-loop model, seismic shift (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: agent orchestrator //ЋИe…™d Т…Щnt ЋИ…ФЋРrk…™stre…™t…Щr//, control plane //k…ЩnЋИtro Кl ple…™n//, AGI clause //ЋМe…™ d ТiЋР ЋИa…™ kl…ФЋРz//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/27
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point вЖТ Reason вЖТ Example вЖТ Point. Lead with the takeaway, support it, ground it in examples, then restate the point.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI News: Introducing GPT-5.5 вАФ OpenAI launched GPT-5.5 for ChatGPT and Codex, positioning it as a faster and more capable model for coding, computer use, research, and long-horizon work. вАҐ Hugging Face Blog: DeepSeek-V4: a million-token context that agents can actually use вАФ Hugging Face analyzed DeepSeek-V4, highlighting 1M-token context models that cut per-token FLOPs and KV-cache requirements enough to make long agent traces more realistic. вАҐ OpenAI News: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT вАФ OpenAI introduced shared workspace agents for long-running organizational workflows in ChatGPT and Slack.
вЬ® Featured expressions: To put that in context, Put differently, What this means is (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: orchestration overhead /ЋМ…ФЋРrk…™ЋИstre…™ Г…Щn ЋИo Кv…Щrhed/, long-horizon work /ЋМl…ФЋР≈Л h…ЩЋИra…™z…Щn w…ЭЋРk/, persistent agent memory /p…ЩrЋИs…™st…Щnt ЋИe…™d Т…Щnt ЋИmem…Щri/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/26
item.description:
Today's framework: Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution вАФ Set the context, surface the tension or change, then close with the practical resolution.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic News: Anthropic and NEC collaborate to build JapanвАЩs largest AI engineering workforce вАФ Anthropic said NEC will deploy Claude across roughly 30,000 employees, build a Japan-based center of excellence, and jointly ship domain-specific AI products for finance, manufacturing, local government, and cybersecurity. вАҐ Windsurf Changelog: Wave 13: Merry Shipmas вАФ Windsurf rolled out first-class support for parallel multi-agent sessions, Git worktrees, side-by-side Cascade panes, and made SWE-1.5 Free the default model for all users for the next three months. вАҐ Anthropic News: An update on our election safeguards вАФ Anthropic detailed new evaluation methodology, political-bias measurements, public datasets, and external review partnerships meant to keep Claude balanced and accurate on election-related questions.
вЬ® Featured expressions: "let's dive into today's AI updates", "To put that in context, NEC is establishing a dedicated Japan-based center of excellence", "What this signifies is a concrete signal that AI coding and workflow agents are transitioning from mere pilot mode into large-scale organizational adoption" (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: center of excellence /ЋМs…Ыnt…Щr …Щv ЋИ…Ыks…Щl…Щns/, Domain-specific AI products /ЋИdo Кme…™n sp…™ЋИs…™f…™k e…™ a…™ ЋИpr…Тd Мkts/, pilot mode /ЋИpa…™l…Щt mo Кd/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/25
item.description: A business-style English briefing on today's AI developments, focused on model capability, agent infrastructure, and developer workflow changes. Practice presentation phrasing while following five selected AI stories.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/24
item.description: A Friday business briefing on GPT-5.5, workspace agents, privacy filtering, faster agent loops, and OpenAIвАЩs new bio bug bounty. Practice presentation English while tracking what these releases mean for agents, privacy, and developer workflows.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/23
item.description: Today's briefing uses the What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What framework to unpack five AI updates around workspace agents, faster agent loops, cloud agent tooling, custom TPU infrastructure, and edge multimodal assistants. The episode is designed for business-English listening practice with practical presentation phrasing and technical vocabulary in context.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/22
item.description: Today's thesis: AI is rapidly industrializing. Before/After/Bridge framework maps five enterprise pain points вАФ change management, output quality, governance, tool-testing, and retrieval вАФ to the week's concrete announcements from OpenAI, AWS, and Hugging Face.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/21 [Shadowing]
item.description: Shadowing practice version вАФ same content at a measured pace (Charon voice). For pronunciation and rhythm practice.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/21
item.description: TodayвАЩs briefing looks at the narrowing open-versus-closed model gap, the hidden economics of tokenizer changes, and how AI is moving into high-stakes operational workflows. It also reinforces the vocabulary needed to discuss model strategy, safety, and cost control in business English.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/20 [Shadowing]
item.description: Shadowing practice version вАФ same content at a measured pace (Charon voice). For pronunciation and rhythm practice.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/20
item.description: This episode discusses the shift towards headless software and the importance of prompt governance in AI development. It covers how AI agents are increasingly interacting directly with software through APIs and structured instruction layers, impacting both software design and business models.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/19 [Shadowing]
item.description:
Shadowing practice version вАФ same content at a measured pace (Charon voice). For pronunciation and rhythm practice.
Sources: Simon Willison вАФ Claude system prompts as a git timeline https://github.com/simonw/research/tree/main/extract-system-prompts#readme
Hugging Face Blog вАФ Building a Fast Multilingual OCR Model with Synthetic Data https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-ocr-v2
OpenAI News вАФ Codex for (almost) everything https://openai.com/index/codex-for-almost-everything/
OpenAI News вАФ The next evolution of the Agents SDK https://openai.com/index/the-next-evolution-of-the-agents-sdk/

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/19
item.description:
A What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What briefing on prompt-governance tooling, multilingual OCR engineering, Codex's expanding desktop agent workflow, and OpenAI's more standardized agent runtime stack.
Sources: Simon Willison вАФ Claude system prompts as a git timeline https://github.com/simonw/research/tree/main/extract-system-prompts#readme
Hugging Face Blog вАФ Building a Fast Multilingual OCR Model with Synthetic Data https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-ocr-v2
OpenAI News вАФ Codex for (almost) everything https://openai.com/index/codex-for-almost-everything/
OpenAI News вАФ The next evolution of the Agents SDK https://openai.com/index/the-next-evolution-of-the-agents-sdk/

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/18
item.description:
A business-style AI English briefing using the Situation вЖТ Complication вЖТ Resolution framework. Today's episode covers major shifts in coding agents, AI-driven design handoff, programmable voice interfaces, reviewer-friendly agent contributions, and richer visual agent workspaces.
Sources: OpenAI News вАФ Codex for (almost) everything https://openai.com/index/codex-for-almost-everything/ Anthropic News вАФ Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-design-anthropic-labs Google Blog вАФ Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-1-flash-tts/ Hugging Face Blog вАФ The PR you would have opened yourself https://huggingface.co/blog/transformers-to-mlx Cursor Changelog вАФ Canvases https://cursor.com/changelog/04-15-26

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/17
item.description: A practical Friday briefing on how AI tooling is shifting from isolated model demos to production workflows, agent infrastructure, controllable voice generation, and higher-quality open source collaboration.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/16
item.description: A What-So-What-Now-What briefing on OpenAI's upgraded Agents SDK, GPT-5.4-Cyber access tiers, Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, and IBM's VAKRA agent benchmark.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/15
item.description: A briefing for Ken covering OpenAI's GPT-5.4-Cyber, Google's agentic coding adoption challenges, and Servo's embeddable browser engine release. The 'Before, After, Bridge' framework is used to explain the changes and connect them to actionable next steps.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/14
item.description: A business-style AI news briefing using the Problem, Solution, Impact framework, covering AI cybersecurity, software supply-chain risk, GoogleвАЩs global AI push, local Gemma audio workflows, and the move toward enterprise agent systems.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 04/13
item.description: Today's Framework: PREP. Covers ALTK-Evolve agent learning, OpenAI enterprise AI infrastructure, the Axios supply chain incident, Anthropic Project Glasswing cybersecurity, and Safetensors joining PyTorch Foundation.
